functions.name: check_availability
functions.description: Check if VIP table is available for specified date, time, and party size. Returns availability status and alternative times if requested slot is unavailable.

time.description: Preferred time in HH:MM 24-hour format (America/Denver timezone)

party_size.description: Number of people in the party (1-10; larger parties should be transferred to human)

alternatives.room: string (XSO Main Room or Cielo Room)

functions.name: create_reservation
functions.description: Create a confirmed VIP table reservation. Only call this after check_availability confirms availability and caller has confirmed all details.

phone.description: Caller's phone number in any format

party_size.description: Number of people (must match check_availability call)

date.description: Reservation date in YYYY-MM-DD format (America/Denver timezone)

time.description: Reservation time in HH:MM 24-hour format (America/Denver timezone)

special_requests.description: Any special requests or notes from the caller (optional)
special_requests.example: Birthday celebration, prefer near dance floor

expected_response.room_assigned: string (XSO Main Room or Cielo Room)

functions.name: send_confirmation
functions.description: Send email and SMS confirmation to the caller after successful reservation. Only call after create_reservation succeeds.

confirmation_data.description: Full reservation details for confirmation message

functions.name: get_event_info
functions.description: Get information about upcoming events at XSO. Optionally filter by date.

date.description: Optional date to check specific event (YYYY-MM-DD format)

day_of_week.description: Optional day of week to get recurring event info

notes: Replace YOUR_WEBHOOK_ID_HERE with actual Make.com webhook IDs
check_availability should be called before create_reservation
send_confirmation should only be called after successful create_reservation
For demo purposes, these can be mocked with static responses
Production: integrate with Tablelist API or custom booking system
Consider rate limiting and error handling in webhook implementations
